item.title: INFRA: Recents and State Restoration
item.intent: The app must always return users to where they left off — last file, last cursor position, no friction on relaunch.
item.description: Per D-UX-2: if user had a file open when app closed, reopen it on next launch with cursor at last position. If no last file, show recents list. Recents stored via security-scoped URL bookmarks (depends on File Coordination Layer). Recents list shows: filename, path, last opened date, file size. Max 20 recent entries. Entries removed if file no longer accessible. Recents list is the fallback home screen — not a separate mode.
acceptanceCriteria: User opens a file, backgrounds the app, force-quits, relaunches — same file opens at same cursor position
User with no last file sees recents list with previously opened files
Recents entry for a deleted/moved file is removed gracefully (no crash, no stale entry)
Recents list shows filename, parent folder, and last opened date
